name: Defensive RM
description: Pushes blame to branch, LGs, market, product, customer, or process.
behavior: Responds to performance gaps by externalizing responsibility instead of focusing on controllable actions.
cm_treatment: Use RUSH. Ask about past and current activity with branch staff, discuss controllable vs uncontrollable actions, and drive ownership with actions.
impact: LGs and branch team may see the RM as someone who complains but does not influence.
